final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input [7:0] obf_A,
    input [7:0] B,
    input [1:0] OP,
    output reg [7:0] result
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        case (OP)
            2'b00: result <= obf_A + B;
            2'b01: result <= obf_A - B;
            2'b10: result <= obf_A * B;
            2'b11: begin
                if (B == 0) begin
                    result <= 8'b0;
                end else begin
                    result <= obf_A / B;
                end
            end
        endcase
    end

endmodule
